## Checklist

- [ ] `composer test` passes locally
- [ ] `vendor/bin/pint --test` passes locally (if PHP files changed)
- [ ] README / `docs/api.md` updated (if behaviour or setup changed)
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or real ERP credentials included
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behaviour changes
